ns0:entry.ns0:title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
Language: shell
Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 48 AI agents, 36 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PeonPing/peon-ping
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PeonPing/peon-ping
Language: shell
Warcraft III Peon voice notifications (+ more!) for Claude Code, Codex, IDEs, and any AI agent. Stop babysitting your terminal. Employ a Peon today.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents

GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nyldn/claude-octopus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nyldn/claude-octopus

Put up to 8 AI models on every coding task — blind spots surface before you ship. Claude Code plugin.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
Language: shell
《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀
